query:
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS project_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.discoveryStatus = 'discovery_queued' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queued,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.discoveryStatus = 'named_contact_no_email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS named_no_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.discoveryStatus = 'no_contacts' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
LEFT JOIN projectBusinessLineScores bls ON bls.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND p.enrichmentBlockedReason IS NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.priority, p.discoveryStatus
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
  AND COALESCE(MAX(bls.score), 0) >= 50
ORDER BY p.priority;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS project_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.discoveryStatus = 'discovery_queued' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queued,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.discoveryStatus = 'named_contact_no_email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS named_no_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.discoveryStatus = 'no_contacts' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_contacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
LEFT JOIN projectBusinessLineScores bls ON bls.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND p.enrichmentBlockedReason IS NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.priority, p.discoveryStatus
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
  AND COALESCE(MAX(bls.score), 0) >= 50
ORDER BY p.priority;
